title: Deployed JIA — AI goal accountability app
desc: Vibecoded a full goal manager with AI advisor, heatmap, line chart, and weekly reflect tab. First real shipped product. Wired to DeepSeek API for the chat layer.

title: Git staging strategies for open source contributions
desc: Finally understood the difference between git add ., explicit file staging, and git add -p. Patch mode is the move for clean commits.

title: MongoDB connection dropping silently on idle
desc: Traced it to a missing keepAlive option in the Mongoose connect config. One line fix after two hours of debugging. Always check connection options first.

title: How 2's complement actually works
desc: Clicked after using BASE-N mode on the Casio fx-991ES Plus to visualize it. Invert all bits then add 1. Not just theory anymore.

title: Started CBT platform — MEN stack
desc: Scaffolded the university computer-based testing platform. MongoDB schemas for users, questions, exams. Express routes for auth and exam flow.

title: Network topologies and their cable types
desc: Bus uses coaxial, star uses UTP/STP twisted pair, ring uses token passing. Mapped them all for COS 101 and it finally makes sense structurally.

title: Why REST API design matters from day one
desc: Refactored a messy Express router and realized bad naming conventions compounded fast. Naming routes after resources not actions changes everything.

title: PHP session variables not persisting across pages
desc: Forgot session_start() at the top of every page that uses $_SESSION. Embarrassingly simple. Will not forget again.
